title: porpax nana var. brevilinguis
intro: Porpax nana var. brevilinguis is a rare and lesser-known species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Porpax nana var. brevilinguis include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make infusions, tinctures, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
